Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0.Code AS 'BudgetCode', CASE T0.U_BOY_DATA_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN T0.Name + ' - Business Partner Group - '+CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS VARCHAR(4)) WHEN 2 THEN T0.Name + ' - Business Partner - '+CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS VARCHAR(4)) WHEN 3 THEN T0.Name + ' - Item Group - '+CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS VARCHAR(4)) WHEN 4 THEN T0.Name + ' - Item - '+CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS VARCHAR(4)) END AS 'BudgetId', T0.Name AS 'BudgetName', CASE T0.U_BOY_DATA_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Business Partner Group' WHEN 2 THEN 'Business Partner' WHEN 3 THEN 'Item Group' WHEN 4 THEN 'Item' END AS 'BudgetType', T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS 'BudgetYear', T0.U_BOY_COMMENTS AS 'BudgetComments', DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH-1, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01') AS 'Date', T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY AS 'DataEntry', CASE T0.U_BOY_DATA_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN (SELECT TS0.GroupName FROM OCRG TS0 WHERE TS0.GroupCode = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY) WHEN 2 THEN (SELECT TS0.CardName FROM OCRD TS0 WHERE TS0.CardCode = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY) WHEN 3 THEN (SELECT TS0.ItmsGrpNam FROM OITB TS0 WHERE TS0.ItmsGrpCod = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY) WHEN 4 THEN (SELECT TS0.ItemName FROM OITM TS0 WHERE TS0.ItemCode = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY) END AS 'DataEntryName', T2.U_BOY_CREDIT-T2.U_BOY_DEBIT AS 'BudgetValue', CASE T0.U_BOY_DATA_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN ISNULL( ( ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(TS0.LineTotal-(TS0.LineTotal*TS1.DiscPrcnt/100)), 0) FROM INV1 TS0 JOIN OINV TS1 ON TS0.DocEntry = TS1.DocEntry WHERE TS1.CardCode IN ( SELECT TSS0.Cardcode FROM OCRD TSS0 WHERE CAST(TSS0.GroupCode AS NVARCHAR(100)) = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY ) AND TS1.DocDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH-1, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01') AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, (DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01'))) AND (TS0.SlpCode = T1.U_BOY_SEMP OR T1.U_BOY_SEMP = -999) AND (ISNULL(TS0.Project,'') = T1.U_BOY_PROJ OR T1.U_BOY_PROJ = '-999') AND (ISNULL(TS0.OcrCode,'') = T1.U_BOY_PC OR T1.U_BOY_PC = '-999') ) - ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(TS0.LineTotal-(TS0.LineTotal*TS1.DiscPrcnt/100)), 0) FROM RIN1 TS0 JOIN ORIN TS1 ON TS0.DocEntry = TS1.DocEntry WHERE TS1.CardCode IN ( SELECT TSS0.Cardcode FROM OCRD TSS0 WHERE CAST(TSS0.GroupCode AS NVARCHAR(100)) = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY ) AND TS1.DocDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH-1, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01') AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, (DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01'))) AND (TS0.SlpCode = T1.U_BOY_SEMP OR T1.U_BOY_SEMP = -999) AND (ISNULL(TS0.Project,'') = T1.U_BOY_PROJ OR T1.U_BOY_PROJ = '-999') AND (ISNULL(TS0.OcrCode,'') = T1.U_BOY_PC OR T1.U_BOY_PC = '-999') ) ) ,0) WHEN 2 THEN ISNULL( ( ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(TS0.LineTotal-(TS0.LineTotal*TS1.DiscPrcnt/100)), 0) FROM INV1 TS0 JOIN OINV TS1 ON TS0.DocEntry = TS1.DocEntry WHERE TS1.CardCode = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY AND TS1.DocDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH-1, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01') AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, (DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01'))) AND (TS0.SlpCode = T1.U_BOY_SEMP OR T1.U_BOY_SEMP = -999) AND (ISNULL(TS0.Project,'') = T1.U_BOY_PROJ OR T1.U_BOY_PROJ = '-999') AND (ISNULL(TS0.OcrCode,'') = T1.U_BOY_PC OR T1.U_BOY_PC = '-999') ) - ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(TS0.LineTotal-(TS0.LineTotal*TS1.DiscPrcnt/100)), 0) FROM RIN1 TS0 JOIN ORIN TS1 ON TS0.DocEntry = TS1.DocEntry WHERE TS1.CardCode = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY AND TS1.DocDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH-1, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01') AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, (DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01'))) AND (TS0.SlpCode = T1.U_BOY_SEMP OR T1.U_BOY_SEMP = -999) AND (ISNULL(TS0.Project,'') = T1.U_BOY_PROJ OR T1.U_BOY_PROJ = '-999') AND (ISNULL(TS0.OcrCode,'') = T1.U_BOY_PC OR T1.U_BOY_PC = '-999') ) ) ,0) WHEN 3 THEN ISNULL( ( ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(TS0.LineTotal-(TS0.LineTotal*TS1.DiscPrcnt/100)), 0) FROM INV1 TS0 JOIN OINV TS1 ON TS0.DocEntry = TS1.DocEntry WHERE TS0.ItemCode IN ( SELECT TSS0.ItemCode FROM OITM TSS0 WHERE CAST(TSS0.ItmsGrpCod AS NVARCHAR(100)) = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY ) AND TS1.DocDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH-1, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01') AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, (DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01'))) AND (TS0.SlpCode = T1.U_BOY_SEMP OR T1.U_BOY_SEMP = -999) AND (ISNULL(TS0.Project,'') = T1.U_BOY_PROJ OR T1.U_BOY_PROJ = '-999') AND (ISNULL(TS0.OcrCode,'') = T1.U_BOY_PC OR T1.U_BOY_PC = '-999') ) - ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(TS0.LineTotal-(TS0.LineTotal*TS1.DiscPrcnt/100)), 0) FROM RIN1 TS0 JOIN ORIN TS1 ON TS0.DocEntry = TS1.DocEntry WHERE TS0.ItemCode IN ( SELECT TSS0.ItemCode FROM OITM TSS0 WHERE CAST(TSS0.ItmsGrpCod AS NVARCHAR(100)) = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY ) AND TS1.DocDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH-1, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01') AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, (DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01'))) AND (TS0.SlpCode = T1.U_BOY_SEMP OR T1.U_BOY_SEMP = -999) AND (ISNULL(TS0.Project,'') = T1.U_BOY_PROJ OR T1.U_BOY_PROJ = '-999') AND (ISNULL(TS0.OcrCode,'') = T1.U_BOY_PC OR T1.U_BOY_PC = '-999') ) ) ,0) WHEN 4 THEN ISNULL( ( ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(TS0.LineTotal-(TS0.LineTotal*TS1.DiscPrcnt/100)), 0) FROM INV1 TS0 JOIN OINV TS1 ON TS0.DocEntry = TS1.DocEntry WHERE TS0.ItemCode = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY AND TS1.DocDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH-1, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01') AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, (DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01'))) AND (TS0.SlpCode = T1.U_BOY_SEMP OR T1.U_BOY_SEMP = -999) AND (ISNULL(TS0.Project,'') = T1.U_BOY_PROJ OR T1.U_BOY_PROJ = '-999') AND (ISNULL(TS0.OcrCode,'') = T1.U_BOY_PC OR T1.U_BOY_PC = '-999') ) - ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(TS0.LineTotal-(TS0.LineTotal*TS1.DiscPrcnt/100)), 0) FROM RIN1 TS0 JOIN ORIN TS1 ON TS0.DocEntry = TS1.DocEntry WHERE TS0.ItemCode = T1.U_BOY_DATA_KEY AND TS1.DocDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH-1, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01') AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, (DATEADD(MONTH, T2.U_BOY_MONTH, CAST(T0.U_BOY_YEAR AS NVARCHAR(4))+RIGHT(REPLICATE('0',1)+CAST(T0.U_BOY_MONTH AS NVARCHAR(2)), 2)+'01'))) AND (TS0.SlpCode = T1.U_BOY_SEMP OR T1.U_BOY_SEMP = -999) AND (ISNULL(TS0.Project,'') = T1.U_BOY_PROJ OR T1.U_BOY_PROJ = '-999') AND (ISNULL(TS0.OcrCode,'') = T1.U_BOY_PC OR T1.U_BOY_PC = '-999') ) ) ,0) END AS 'ActualValue', T1.U_BOY_SEMP AS SalesEmployeeCode, T1.U_BOY_PROJ AS ProjectCode, T1.U_BOY_PC AS ProfitCenterCode, CASE T1.U_BOY_SEMP WHEN -999 THEN '-Not defined-' ELSE (SELECT SlpName FROM OSLP WHERE SlpCode = T1.U_BOY_SEMP) END AS 'SalesEmployee', CASE T1.U_BOY_PROJ WHEN '-999' THEN '-Not defined-' ELSE (SELECT PrjName FROM OPRJ WHERE PrjCode = T1.U_BOY_PROJ) END AS 'Project', CASE T1.U_BOY_PC WHEN '-999' THEN '- Not defined-' ELSE (SELECT OcrName FROM OOCR WHERE OcrCode = T1.U_BOY_PC) END AS 'ProfitCenter' FROM [@BOY_90_BUD] T0 JOIN [@BOY_90_BUD_ENTRY] T1 ON T0.Code = T1.U_BOY_BUDGET_FK JOIN [@BOY_90_BUD_ENTRY_M] T2 ON T1.Code = T2.U_BOY_ENTRY_FK

DataDefinition.RecordSelectionFormula: ( ( ( {Data.BudgetCode} = {?Budget} AND ( {Data.ProjectCode} = {?Project} OR {?Project} = "-999" ) ) AND ( {Data.ProfitCenterCode} = {?ProfitCenter} OR {?ProfitCenter} = "-999" ) ) AND ( {Data.SalesEmployeeCode} = {?SalesEmployee} OR {?SalesEmployee} = -999 ) )
